system.description:
Discipline: None
Skill: Command against Hardiness
Type: Normal
Qi: 10

You unleash a violent scream that fills the surrounding air with storm-like winds. The sound is so loud it knocks people to the ground and leaves them delirious with madness. Make a Command roll against everyone in a 100-foot radius per Rank of Qi. On a Success everyone below your Qi rating within the area is knocked prone to the ground. The sound is so loud it disrupts the balance in their minds, driving them permanently mad. Those affected are nearly catatonic the first few days. Once that passes they emerge with a pronounced negative change to their personality. This is significant and specific to the individual. Some may fly into rages at the slightest provocation, others may cower in fear. Some may be delusional or talk to people who are not there. The GM should determine the nature of the madness on a case-by-case basis and give them the appropriate Mental Affliction.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Targets below user's Qi Rating are knocked prone and driven permanently mad; GM assigns the resulting Mental Affliction or personality change
